# Alignment and RL Fine-Tuning {#sec-18-alignment}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*From next-token prediction to helpfulness: instruction tuning, preference learning, and RLHF in outline.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `Module 11 slide decks (11.4RL, alignment)`
transcripts:
- `(slides-only module)`
-->
